title: Support finding default clocking in interface above class

features.name: interface with default clocking block
features.description: Code should include an interface with a default clocking block defined inside it

features.name: class inside interface using cycle delay
features.description: Code should include a class defined inside an interface where a method uses the cycle delay operator ##(cycles)

features.name: virtual class with pure virtual tasks
features.description: Code should include a virtual class with pure virtual task declarations used as an abstract BFM pattern

features.name: class instantiation inside interface
features.description: Code should include a class instantiated as a member inside an interface that has a default clocking
